data.text: WHAT LUCK! ANOTHER FELYSIAN WORLD IN THE SAME SYSTEM! THIS ONE IS
BLUE, AND HAS A LOT MORE WATER COMPARED TO FALIPON. THE GRAVITY AND
PRESSURE ARE 0.9/1.1 HERE, AND EVERYTHING IS GENERALLY MORE PLEASANT
195.53: GREEN ROLLING HILLS AND COASTLINE, AND A FOREST OF
207.65:LANDING SITE IS IN THE MIDDLE OF AN INTERESTING RECEDED LAKE
